name: check_versions
description: Validates the `version` column format and uniqueness within a COD-AB boundary file.

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the boundary file (any pandas/geopandas-compatible format: .gpkg, .geojson, .csv, .parquet, .xlsx, etc.)

name: check_dates
description: Validates the `valid_on` and `valid_to` date columns of a COD-AB boundary file.

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the boundary file (any pandas/geopandas-compatible format: .gpkg, .geojson, .csv, .parquet, .xlsx, etc.)
